title: Signa: automatic ArUco ground control point detection for WebODM
description: Signa is a WebODM plugin for automatic ArUco ground-control-point (GCP) detection. It detects ArUco markers in a photogrammetry task's images, matches them against measured GCP coordinates, and produces an OpenDroneMap-compatible gcp_list.txt for single-pass georeferencing of (archaeological) drone surveys, server-side inside WebODM with no command line.
